title: Determination of Stability Constants of 2-Hydroxy-1-Naphthalidene-4'-Hydroxyaniline Complexes with Mg2+ CO2+ Ni2+ and Cu2+
author: M. S, MAYADEO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnarain Ruia College, Matunga, Bombay-400 019 

  Manuscript received 6 August 1981, accepted I May 1982  

 Potentiometric studies on metal complexes of Mg 2+ , Co 2+ , Ni 2+  and Cu 2+  with-2-hydroxy-1-naphthalidene-4 ' -hydroxyaniline have been carried out. The proton-ligand dissociation constants ( p K 1  and pK 1 ) of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal complexes have been determined by Bjerrum's method at 25±0.1º and at an ionic strength 0.1 M in 75 : 25 percent (v/v) dioxane-water medium
